description: Comparing baseline and candidate under different inputs, data sizes, or environments, so the delta reflects the setup, not the code.
body: Failure mode: the candidate is benchmarked with a different dataset, input distribution, machine, or runtime flag than the baseline, so the measured difference is attributable to the changed conditions rather than the code change. Detection signals: input size or environment differs between runs; results not reproducible on a matched setup; no recorded environment manifest. Do not compare across mismatched workloads or hosts. Safer fallback: fix the identical workload and pinned environment for both, run them back-to-back on the same host, and record the environment with each result before attributing any delta.
